title: Wholesome Nutty Shattering Duck Legs Tagine
description: A hearty and aromatic Ukrainian dish featuring duck legs cooked in a clay tajine with wholesome nuttiness and vibrant flavors.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200 degrees C (390 F).
Drizzle duck legs with olive oil and season lightly.
Sauté onions, garlic, and diced aubergine in the remaining olive oil until soft, about 15 minutes.
Add thyme sprigs, bay leaves, chopped nuts, and sliced pistachios to the pan. Cook for an additional minute.
Place duck legs on top of the vegetables. Pour water into the tajine to cover the duck legs completely.
Bring the liquid to a simmer. Cover tightly with a lid or aluminum foil.
Bake in preheated oven for 1 hour and 20 minutes, flipping the legs halfway through cooking time.
Serve hot garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
